text:
GPT-based metrics and code-based metrics against RAG chat apps.
Here are the results from evaluations against a synthetically generated data set for a RAG app based on my personal blog posts:

search mode  groundedness  relevance  answer_length  citation_match
vector only  2.79  1.81  366.73  0.02
text only  4.87  4.74  662.34  0.89
hybrid  3.26  2.15  365.66  0.11
hybrid with ranker  4.89  4.78  670.89  0.92

Despite being the author of this blog post, I was shocked to see how poorly vector search did on its...
with an average groundedness of 2.79 (out of 5) and only 2% of the answers with citations matching
ground truth citations. Full-text search on its own did fairly well, with an average groundedness of 4.8
a citation match rate of 89%. Hybrid search without the semantic ranker improved upon vector search,
an average groundedness of 3.26 and citation match of 11%, but it did much better with the semantic
